case_title: CARTER RAYMOND VS WEST COAST TOWING SERVICE

docket_entries.description: PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CARTER RAYMOND IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WEST COAST TOWING SERVICE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
